name: Metro Pawn and Gun
description_short: Licensed pawnbroker in Richfield, MN offering collateral-based loans, firearms sales, jewelry, electronics, tools, and coins since 1994.
description_long:
Metro Pawn & Gun has operated as a pawn shop in the Twin Cities area since 1994, establishing itself as a licensed pawnbroker serving the Richfield and Minneapolis communities. The business operates from a single physical location at 7529 Lyndale Avenue South in Richfield, positioning itself as an accessible alternative to traditional lending for consumers in the greater Minneapolis metropolitan area.

The company offers collateral-based loans without credit requirements, purchasing items of value and providing loans on pawn. Their inventory spans firearms (handguns, rifles, shotguns, collectible firearms), jewelry and precious metals (gold, silver, coins), electronics (car audio, home electronics, personal electronics), tools, and miscellaneous collectibles. They purchase items outright for resale, accept forfeited pawn items, and facilitate firearms transfers. The company also maintains online sales channels through Davidson's Gallery of Guns, eBay, and GunBroker, extending reach beyond their physical location.

Metro Pawn & Gun differentiates itself through its emphasis on loan-to-value ratios, diverse inventory that changes frequently, and specific expertise in firearms selection. The company markets itself as "on the cutting edge of pawn shop style" and emphasizes the reliability and trust factor in their operations. Their single-location model means they've maintained consistency in the Twin Cities market for nearly 30 years, and their online presence through multiple platforms demonstrates modernization efforts.

As a traditional pawn shop, Metro Pawn & Gun serves consumers needing quick access to cash through collateral loans, those seeking to sell unused items, and buyers looking for discounted merchandise. The main limitation is the single physical location and the inherent nature of pawn transactions—collateral must have immediate resale value, and loans are secured debt requiring repayment or item forfeiture. No APR, repayment terms, or loan amount information is publicly disclosed on their website.
pros: No credit check required for pawn loans, making it accessible to consumers with poor or no credit history
Licensed pawnbroker operating since 1994 with established local reputation in Minneapolis-Richfield area
Diverse inventory (firearms, jewelry, electronics, tools, coins) changes frequently, offering varied shopping options
Multiple online sales channels (Davidson's Gallery of Guns, eBay, GunBroker) provide convenient remote purchasing
Specializes in firearms with selection of handguns from multiple manufacturers and offers firearms transfer services
Physically accessible location with extended weekday hours (10am-7pm Mon-Fri, 10am-5pm Sat)
Purchases items outright, accepts forfeited pawn merchandise, and offers gold/silver/precious metals buying
cons: Single physical location limits accessibility for consumers outside the Twin Cities metro area
No publicly disclosed information about loan terms, repayment periods, or interest rates on pawn loans
Collateral-based lending requires items of immediate resale value, restricting who can access loans
Website lacks customer reviews, testimonials, or third-party ratings to verify service quality claims
Pawn loans require item surrender during loan period, creating retrieval risk if unable to repay on time
best_for: Consumers in the Minneapolis-Richfield area needing quick cash without credit checks or approval processes
People selling unused firearms, jewelry, electronics, or collectibles for immediate payment
Bargain hunters seeking discounted merchandise including specialty items like rare coins or collectible firearms
Gun buyers in Minnesota seeking firearms purchases through online platforms or in-person transfers
diagnosis: Metro Pawn & Gun is best for Twin Cities-area residents needing quick cash without credit approval, those selling unused valuables, or firearms/collectibles buyers seeking discounted merchandise. The main caveat is that pawn loans are collateral-dependent, require item surrender during the loan term, and lack transparent disclosure of rates and terms on the website.
services: Pawn loans on collateral without credit requirements
Purchase of items (jewelry, firearms, electronics, tools, coins) for resale
Sale of firearms (handguns, rifles, shotguns, collectible firearms)
Jewelry and precious metals buying and selling
Electronics sales (car audio, home electronics, personal electronics)
Online sales through Davidson's Gallery of Guns, eBay, and GunBroker
In-store shopping with inventory changing regularly
